name: codex-menu-bar
description: Menu bar status bridge for Codex companion app.

interface.shortDescription: Update a local Codex menu bar status indicator.
interface.longDescription: Codex Menu Bar provides a local MCP status bridge for a macOS menu bar companion app. The companion app watches a local status file and shows running, idle, waiting, message, and error states while Codex works.
defaultPrompt: Show Codex work status in the menu bar
Set my menu bar status to running
Mark the Codex menu bar status idle
